name: chem1_end2
note: Chemistry MEH ending (fizzle), 12 frames @10FPS (1.2s — frame count padded 1.25x so realtime playback feels like 0.8x speed). The flask glows faintly for a moment, then the glow fizzles out to nothing; a '?' mark pops up over her head as she puzzles over it, then she hides the flask and beaker behind her back. FRAME 0 must match frame 0 of chem1_loop exactly (flask with magenta-pink liquid at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, beaker with cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass). LAST FRAME: neutral stand, empty hands at her sides (matches the idle base pose). Prop rules same as the loop; liquid levels never change.
frames: Pose: base pose with a hint of a reaction: standing upright, feet close together, the Erlenmeyer flask of vivid magenta-pink liquid at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass — the liquid in the flask beginning to give off a FAINT soft white glow with two tiny sparkles above it. Her eyes widening with hopeful anticipation, small excited smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the glow at its (modest) peak: the flask's magenta-pink liquid glowing a gentle warm white with a few small sparkles rising from the flask mouth, flask still at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. She leans her face in a little closer, eyes big and expectant, mouth a hopeful little 'o'. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: holding her breath over the glow: same composition — softly glowing flask at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass — her shoulders rising as she inhales expectantly, hands cradling the flask a touch closer, eyes shining, sparkles hovering. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the glow already fading: the light around the flask dimming visibly, sparkles shrinking to one last tiny dot, the magenta-pink liquid returning to its ordinary color. Same prop positions (flask LEFT side of the image at chest height, beaker RIGHT side of the image at shoulder height), liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Her hopeful smile freezing, eyebrows starting to knit. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: fizzled out completely: the flask now completely ordinary, no glow, no sparkles, just plain magenta-pink liquid sitting still. Same prop positions, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. She blinks at it — eyes plain and round, mouth a small flat line, one slow blink mid-frame. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: a second blink and a closer stare: leaning her face down toward the plain flask, squinting at it as if it might do something after all, lips pressed together. Flask still at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: puzzlement, key frame: her head tilting to the side toward the RIGHT side of the image, a bold cartoon QUESTION MARK '?' popping up in the air just above her head, eyes turned up toward it, lips pursed in a confused little pout. Flask of magenta-pink liquid still at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: peak confusion: head tilted the other way toward the LEFT side of the image, the cartoon '?' above her head now bigger and brighter, one eyebrow raised high, the other scrunched, cheeks puffed in a baffled pout as she stares hard at the flask. Same prop positions, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: giving up with a tiny shrug: head returning to center, shoulders popping up in a small shrug, the '?' above her head fading to a faint outline, expression settling into a resigned 'oh well' half-smile with closed eyes. Flask (LEFT side of the image) and beaker (RIGHT side of the image) still in hand at the same heights, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: hiding the props: both arms swinging back behind her body, the flask and the beaker disappearing behind her back, elbows poking out at her sides, the '?' gone. Mildly sheepish expression, eyes open again glancing aside, small wry smile. Feet close together, body upright. No props visible in front. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: props fully hidden: both hands behind her back, posture straightening, a lingering puzzled look softening into an amused little smile, one last tiny sweat drop beside her temple. Feet close together, body upright. No props visible. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: FINAL FRAME — neutral stand matching the idle base pose: standing upright and relaxed, both arms resting naturally at her sides with empty open hands, no props visible, soft content smile with a hint of bemusement, eyes bright. Feet close together under her hips. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
